story.title: Transparent Tracking in a Complex World
story.text1: Founded in 2024, ShipTrack was born out of a simple frustration: tracking packages across multiple countries and carriers was fragmented, slow, and often inaccurate.
story.text2: Our team of logistics experts and engineers built a platform that harmonizes tracking data from 1,200+ carriers into a single, clean, and real-time dashboard.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: The principles that drive our innovation.

trust.title: Trust Over Everything
trust.text: We provide verified tracking events directly from the source, ensuring you always have the truth.

speed.title: Speed is a Feature
speed.text: Our API and UI are optimized for instant results. No waiting, no loading spinners, just data.

precision.title: Precision in Detail
precision.text: From city-level location tracking to local time estimation, we sweat the small stuff.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | ShipTrack
seo.description: Read our privacy policy to understand how ShipTrack protects your data

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is critical to us. We build our platform with the strictest security protocols to protect your shipment data.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.text: When you use ShipTrack, we collect minimum necessary data to provide our tracking services. This includes:
section1.item2: Public tracking data provided by couriers.
section1.item3: IP address and browser metadata for security and analytics.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Data
section2.text: We use the collected information solely to:
section2.item3: Maintain platform security and prevent fraudulent misuse.
section2.item4: Respond to your customer support inquiries.

section3.title: 3. Data Sharing
section3.text: ShipTrack does not sell your personal data. We only share data with third-party carriers (to fetch tracking status) or legal entities when required by law.

section4.title: 4. Security
section4.text: We implement industry-standard encryption for data at rest and in transit. Your tracking history is stored securely using cloud-native security practices.

section5.title: 5. Contact Us
section5.text: For any privacy-related questions, please contact our Data Protection Officer at

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our tracking service.
faq.q1: How do I track my shipment?
faq.a1: Simply enter your unique tracking number in the search bar on our homepage. We'll automatically detect the carrier and display the current status and location of your package.
faq.a2: We support over 1,200 global carriers, including FedEx, UPS, DHL, USPS, Royal Mail, China Post, and many local delivery services. Our system is designed for universal compatibility.
faq.q3: What should I do if my tracking number isn't working?
faq.a3: First, verify that the tracking number is entered correctly without spaces. If it's a new shipment, please wait 24-48 hours as some carriers delay status updates. If the problem persists, contact the sender or the carrier directly.
faq.a4: Yes! ShipTrack is a free platform for individual users to track their shipments globally. We also offer enterprise solutions for e-commerce businesses needing advanced integration.
